title: Growth benefits of MDCF-2 persist to 24 months in extended follow-up of malnourished children
abstract: Extending the original MDCF-2 trial, we followed the Bangladeshi cohort to 24 months. Children who received microbiome-directed complementary food MDCF-2 maintained their advantage over the standard-supplement arm in linear growth and retained a more mature, repaired microbiota and elevated growth-associated plasma biomarkers. The durable benefit reinforces and extends the earlier finding that MDCF-2 outperforms standard ready-to-use supplementary food at repairing the microbiota and improving growth.
